sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74296" key="o)cuke/rws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξῠ-κέρως</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n74296.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with pointed horns,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:445" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.445</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
